## Source: ghsa-malware (dfc804efe09ce4a24c8ef96d8f13b88ff8f463aaf89b7c318f345955561ec8c7)
## Source: ossf-package-analysis (8af13a06fb931a42d83e13b19fd998ff62e59ef3d56302bfe9d257e07e2bad46)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'supertag' @ 99.1.1 (crates.io) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.

---
